commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh If you will fear the LORD, and serve him, and obey his voice, and not rebel against the commandment of the LORD, then shall both you and also the king that reigns over you continue following the LORD your God: Of the Lord, causing him to look upon you and treat you with indignation. (Calmet) Septuagint, "and do not contend with the mouth "or against the orders of the Lord, which cannot fail to excite his displeasure. (Menochius) If you prove faithful under this new form of government, though it be less agreeable to God, he will still protect you.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
